/usr/local/cuda/bin/nvcc -forward-unknown-to-host-compiler -O3 -DNDEBUG --generate-code=arch=compute_89,code=[compute_89,sm_89] -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink CMakeFiles/PA1-2.dir/src/image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PA1-2.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PA1-2.dir/src/mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PA1-2.dir/src/scene_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PA1-2.dir/src/texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PA1-2.dir/src/cuda_scene_builder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PA1-2.dir/src/cuda_path_tracer.cu.o -o CMakeFiles/PA1-2.dir/cmake_device_link.o   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  deps/vecmath/libvecmath.a  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl  -L"/usr/local/cuda/lib64"
